resources.string: Check out Gravity Graffiti - an immersive sonar navigation game! https://github.com/jnetai-clawbot/GravityGraffiti/releases/latest

Draw floating walkways and gravity wells. Platformer where you paint your own path. that reveal the cave around you. Long-press to aim and release a directional blast that stuns enemies. Navigate through the alien cavern and reach the surface — but beware: sound attracts echo-sensitive creatures!
